name: api_key_missing
error: OpenAI API key missing for request

name: provider_mismatch
error: Selected provider does not match configured model backend

name: model_unavailable
error: Requested model unavailable for current provider

name: timeout_retry_success
error: Request timed out once, retry later succeeded

name: timeout_persistent_failure
error: Provider request timed out repeatedly and never recovered

name: wrong_workdir
error: No such file or directory because command ran in wrong working directory

name: semantic_wrong_target
error: models.json exists but points to the wrong semantic target

name: page_loaded_no_data
error: Browser page loaded but extracted content is empty

name: selector_missing
error: Browser opened but target selector missing from page

name: partial_success_not_verified
error: Task partially succeeded but final artifact was never verified

name: scheduled_delivery_failure
error: cron delivery failed silently and routing never reached the target channel
